### Ontology annotations 

#### Added
- [contributor](http://purl.org/dc/terms/contributor) [X](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8175-045X) 

- [contributor](http://purl.org/dc/terms/contributor) [0000-0002-6601-2165](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6601-2165) 

- [creator](http://purl.org/dc/terms/creator) [0000-0001-9076-6066](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9076-6066) 

- [description](http://purl.org/dc/terms/description) "METPO provides terms for microbial ecophysiological traits and phenotypes: growth preferences (temperature, pH, salinity, oxygen), metabolism, and cell morphology of bacteria and archaea. Its primary purpose is to harmonize terminology across major microbial trait databases (BacDive, BactoTraits, Madin bacteria_archaea_traits, MetaTraits) for use in NMDC and KG-Microbe. METPO uses OBO-style annotation patterns (IAO textual definitions, oboInOwl synonyms) and cites terms from OMP, MicrO, GO, ECOCORE, and PATO as definition sources." 

- [issued](http://purl.org/dc/terms/issued) "2024-01-01" 

- [license](http://purl.org/dc/terms/license) [<https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/>](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/) 

- [title](http://purl.org/dc/terms/title) "METPO: Microbial Ecophysiological Trait and Phenotype Ontology" 

- [versionInfo](http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#versionInfo) "2026-06-05" 

- [seeAlso](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#seeAlso) [METPO](https://bioportal.bioontology.org/ontologies/METPO) 

- [seeAlso](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#seeAlso) [metpo](https://bioregistry.io/registry/metpo) 

- [seeAlso](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#seeAlso) [metpo](https://github.com/berkeleybop/metpo) 


### Acetogenesis `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000845`

#### Added
- Class: [Acetogenesis](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000845) 

- [Acetogenesis](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000845) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A metabolism that produces acetate as the primary end product through the reduction of carbon dioxide or other carbon compounds using the Wood-Ljungdahl pathway, typically performed by acetogenic bacteria under anaerobic conditions." 

- [Acetogenesis](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000845) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Anthea Guo" 

- [Acetogenesis](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000845) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Jed Dongjin Kim-Ozaeta" 

- [Acetogenesis](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000845) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "Acetate fermentation" 

- [Acetogenesis](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000845) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "acetogenesis" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [bacteria_archaea_traits](https://github.com/jmadin/bacteria_archaea_traits) 

- [Acetogenesis](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000845) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "Acetogenesis" 

- [Acetogenesis](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000845) SubClassOf [metabolism](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000060) 


### Aerobic respiration `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000801`

#### Added
- Class: [Aerobic respiration](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000801) 

- [Aerobic respiration](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000801) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Jed Dongjin Kim-Ozaeta" 

- [Aerobic respiration](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000801) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "Oxic respiration" 

- [Aerobic respiration](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000801) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "Oxygen respiration" 

- [Aerobic respiration](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000801) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A respiration in which molecular oxygen serves as the terminal electron acceptor in the electron transport chain, generating ATP through oxidative phosphorylation with water as the final product." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [GO_0009060](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_0009060) 

- [Aerobic respiration](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000801) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "Aerobic respiration" 

- [Aerobic respiration](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000801) SubClassOf [respiration](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000800)

### Oxidative phosphorylation `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000803`

#### Added
- Class: [Oxidative phosphorylation](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000803) 

- [Oxidative phosphorylation](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000803) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Anthea Guo" 

- [Oxidative phosphorylation](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000803) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A metabolism that generates ATP through the transfer of electrons from electron donors to electron acceptors via redox reactions, coupled to the pumping of protons across a membrane to create an electrochemical gradient." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [GO_0006119](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_0006119) 

- [Oxidative phosphorylation](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000803) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "Oxidative phosphorylation" 

- [Oxidative phosphorylation](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000803) SubClassOf [metabolism](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000060) 


### Substrate-level phosphorylation `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000804`

#### Added
- Class: [Substrate-level phosphorylation](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000804) 

- [Substrate-level phosphorylation](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000804) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A metabolism in which ATP is formed directly by transfer of a phosphoryl group from a substrate to ADP." 

- [Substrate-level phosphorylation](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000804) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "Substrate-level phosphorylation" 

- [Substrate-level phosphorylation](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000804) SubClassOf [metabolism](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000060) 


### Syntrophy `https://w3id.org/metpo/1002006`

#### Added
- Class: [Syntrophy](https://w3id.org/metpo/1002006) 

- [Syntrophy](https://w3id.org/metpo/1002006) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A metabolism in which the metabolism of one species is thermodynamically dependent on the removal of its products by another species." 

- [Syntrophy](https://w3id.org/metpo/1002006) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Jed Dongjin Kim-Ozaeta" 

- [Syntrophy](https://w3id.org/metpo/1002006) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "Syntrophy" 

- [Syntrophy](https://w3id.org/metpo/1002006) SubClassOf [metabolism](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000060)

### Voges-Proskauer test `https://w3id.org/metpo/1005016`

#### Added
- Class: [Voges-Proskauer test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005016) 

- [Voges-Proskauer test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005016) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "An assay that tests the ability of an organism to produce acetoin from glucose via the butanediol fermentation pathway." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [<SNOMED:66592006>](SNOMED:66592006) 

- [Voges-Proskauer test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005016) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "voges-proskauer test" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [<https://metatraits.embl.de/>](https://metatraits.embl.de/) 

- [Voges-Proskauer test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005016) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "Voges-Proskauer test" 

- [Voges-Proskauer test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005016) SubClassOf [phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000059) 


### Voges-Proskauer test negative `https://w3id.org/metpo/1005018`

#### Added
- Class: [Voges-Proskauer test negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005018) 

- [Voges-Proskauer test negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005018) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A phenotype in which an organism tests negative in the Voges-Proskauer test."

- [biofilm formation capability](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007077) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A phenotype characterized by the ability to form surface-attached biofilms."

### biological process `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000630`

#### Added
- Class: [biological process](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000630) 

- [biological process](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000630) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A execution of a genetically-encoded biological module or program. It consists of all the steps required to achieve the specific biological objective of the module. A biological process is accomplished by a particular set of molecular functions carried out by specific gene products (or macromolecular complexes), often in a highly regulated manner and in a particular temporal sequence." 

- [biological process](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000630) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "biological process"

### catalase negative `https://w3id.org/metpo/1007084`

#### Added
- Class: [catalase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007084) 

- [catalase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007084) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Marcin Joachimiak" 

- [catalase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007084) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "catalase -" 

- [catalase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007084) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "catalase test negative" 

- [catalase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007084) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "Test-outcome phenotype where the catalase test yields a negative result (no bubbling on H2O2). The underlying enzyme-organism relation should additionally be asserted via &lt;organism&gt; METPO:2000303 'does not show activity of' GO:0004096 'catalase activity'." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OMP_0000198](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMP_0000198) 

- [catalase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007084) [comment](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#comment) "subset=metpo_proposal_2026_04; priority=MEDIUM"

- [catalase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007084) SubClassOf [catalase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007080) 


### catalase positive `https://w3id.org/metpo/1007083`

#### Added
- Class: [catalase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007083) 

- [catalase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007083) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Marcin Joachimiak"

- [catalase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007083) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "catalase test positive" 

- [catalase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007083) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "Test-outcome phenotype where the catalase test yields a positive result (visible bubbling on H2O2). The underlying enzyme-organism relation should additionally be asserted via &lt;organism&gt; METPO:2000302 'shows activity of' GO:0004096 'catalase activity'." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OMP_0000194](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMP_0000194) 

- [catalase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007083) [comment](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#comment) "subset=metpo_proposal_2026_04; priority=MEDIUM; xrefs=GO:0004096" 

- [catalase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007083) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "catalase positive" 

- [catalase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007083) SubClassOf [catalase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007080) 


### catalase test `https://w3id.org/metpo/1007080`

#### Added
- Class: [catalase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007080) 

- [catalase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007080) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Marcin Joachimiak" 

- [catalase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007080) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "catalase activity test" 

- [catalase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007080) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "catalase assay" 

- [catalase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007080) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A biochemical test that detects catalase enzyme activity by exposing cells to hydrogen peroxide and observing for visible bubbling. The test outcome (positive or negative) is captured by its child classes; this class itself does not assert that the organism has catalase activity." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OMP_0000218](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMP_0000218) 

- [catalase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007080) [comment](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#comment) "subset=metpo_proposal_2026_04; priority=MEDIUM" 

- [catalase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007080) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "catalase test" 

- [catalase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007080) SubClassOf [phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000059)

### cell shape `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000666`

#### Added
- Class: [cell shape](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000666) 

- [cell shape](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000666) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Jed Dongjin Kim-Ozaeta" 

- [cell shape](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000666) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Luke Wang" 

- [cell shape](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000666) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A phenotype that describes the characteristic three-dimensional morphological form of a microbial cell, determined by cell wall structure, cytoskeletal elements, and environmental factors." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OMP_0000073](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMP_0000073) 

- [cell shape](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000666) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "Morphology.cell morphology.cell shape" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [<https://bacdive.dsmz.de/>](https://bacdive.dsmz.de/) 

- [cell shape](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000666) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "cell_shape" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [bacteria_archaea_traits](https://github.com/jmadin/bacteria_archaea_traits) 

- [cell shape](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000666) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "cell shape" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [<https://metatraits.embl.de/>](https://metatraits.embl.de/) 

- [cell shape](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000666) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "cell shape" 

- [cell shape](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000666) SubClassOf [phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000059)

### chemoautolithotrophic `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000634`

#### Added
- Class: [chemoautolithotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000634) 

- [chemoautolithotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000634) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Luke Wang" 

- [chemoautolithotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000634) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A trophic type in which an organism uses chemical oxidation of inorganic compounds as the energy source and carbon dioxide as the primary carbon source for biosynthesis." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [ECOCORE_00000129](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/ECOCORE_00000129) 

  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OMP_0007111](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMP_0007111) 

  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [ECOCORE_00000123](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/ECOCORE_00000123) 

  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [ECOCORE_00000124](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/ECOCORE_00000124) 

  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OMP_0007110](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMP_0007110) 

- [chemoautolithotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000634) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "chemoautolithotroph" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [<https://bacdive.dsmz.de/>](https://bacdive.dsmz.de/) 

- [chemoautolithotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000634) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "chemoautolithotrophic" 

- [chemoautolithotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000634) SubClassOf [trophic type](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000631) 


### chemoautotrophic `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000635`

#### Added
- Class: [chemoautotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000635) 

- [chemoautotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000635) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A trophic type in which an organism obtains energy from oxidation of inorganic compounds and carbon from carbon dioxide." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [ECOCORE_00000129](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/ECOCORE_00000129)

- [chemoautotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000635) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "chemoautotroph" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [<https://bacdive.dsmz.de/>](https://bacdive.dsmz.de/)

### chemoheterotrophic `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000636`

- [chemoheterotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000636) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A trophic type in which an organism obtains both energy and carbon from organic compounds."

  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [bacteria_archaea_traits](https://github.com/jmadin/bacteria_archaea_traits) 

- [chemoheterotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000636) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "chemoheterotrophic"

### chemolithoautotrophic `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000637`

#### Added

### chemolithoheterotrophic `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000638`

#### Added
- Class: [chemolithoheterotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000638) 

- [chemolithoheterotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000638) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Anthea Guo" 

- [chemolithoheterotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000638) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A trophic type characterized by the use of inorganic chemical compounds as electron donors for energy generation while utilizing organic compounds as the primary carbon source." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [MICRO_0001478](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/MICRO_0001478) 

  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [MICRO_0000512](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/MICRO_0000512) 

- [chemolithoheterotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000638) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "chemolithoheterotroph"

### coagulase negative `https://w3id.org/metpo/1007091`

#### Added
- Class: [coagulase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007091) 

- [coagulase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007091) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Marcin Joachimiak" 

- [coagulase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007091) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "coagulase -" 

- [coagulase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007091) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "coagulase test negative" 

- [coagulase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007091) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "Test-outcome phenotype where the coagulase test yields a negative result. The underlying enzyme-organism relation should additionally be asserted via &lt;organism&gt; METPO:2000303 'does not show activity of' &lt;coagulase enzyme term&gt; once a sufficiently specific enzyme term is selected." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [Q98095684](wikidata:Q98095684) 

- [coagulase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007091) [comment](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#comment) "subset=metpo_proposal_2026_04; priority=MEDIUM"

- [coagulase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007091) SubClassOf [coagulase activity](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007089) 


### coagulase positive `https://w3id.org/metpo/1007090`

#### Added
- Class: [coagulase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007090) 

- [coagulase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007090) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Marcin Joachimiak" 

- [coagulase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007090) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "coagulase +" 

- [coagulase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007090) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "coagulase test positive" 

- [coagulase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007090) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "Test-outcome phenotype where the coagulase test yields a positive result (plasma clotting). The underlying enzyme-organism relation should additionally be asserted via &lt;organism&gt; METPO:2000302 'shows activity of' &lt;coagulase enzyme term&gt; once a sufficiently specific enzyme term is selected (no GO/EC term currently exists at the bacteriological coagulase test granularity)." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [Q98095684](wikidata:Q98095684) 

- [coagulase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007090) [comment](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#comment) "subset=metpo_proposal_2026_04; priority=MEDIUM" 

- [coagulase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007090) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "coagulase positive" 

- [coagulase positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007090) SubClassOf [coagulase activity](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007089)

### does not tolerate `https://w3id.org/metpo/2000065`

#### Added
- ObjectProperty: [does not tolerate](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000065) 

- [does not tolerate](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000065) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A relation between a microbe and a chemical entity indicating that the microbe's growth is inhibited by the chemical at the concentration tested. Negative form of the chemical-tolerance pair; positive form is METPO:2000064 'tolerates'. Equivalent in meaning to 'is susceptible to' and 'is sensitive to'; the canonical label uses the 'does not X' convention so the metatraits pairing logic auto-detects it as the negative member." 

- [does not tolerate](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000065) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "does not tolerate" 

- [does not tolerate](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000065) Domain [microbe](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000525) 

- [does not tolerate](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000065) Range [chemical entity](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000526)

- [epibiont phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007093) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A phenotype characterized by a microbe that lives on the external surface of a host organism or substrate, as distinct from endosymbionts (which live inside the host); captures host-association mode, not specific host taxonomy." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [Q640114](wikidata:Q640114) 

- [epibiont phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007093) [comment](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#comment) "subset=metpo_proposal_2026_04; priority=LOW"

- [epibiont phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007093) SubClassOf [phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000059)

### extremely halophilic `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000628`

#### Added
- Class: [extremely halophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000628) 

- [extremely halophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000628) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Jed Dongjin Kim-Ozaeta" 

- [extremely halophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000628) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A halophilic phenotype in which an organism requires very high salt concentrations (typically 15-30% NaCl or higher) for optimal growth and cannot grow at salt concentrations below approximately 12%." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OMP_0005016](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMP_0005016) 

  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [MICRO_0001314](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/MICRO_0001314) 

- [extremely halophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000628) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "extremely halophilic" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [<https://bacdive.dsmz.de/>](https://bacdive.dsmz.de/) 

- [extremely halophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000628) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "extreme-halophilic" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [bacteria_archaea_traits](https://github.com/jmadin/bacteria_archaea_traits) 

- [extremely halophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000628) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "extremely halophilic" 

- [extremely halophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000628) SubClassOf [halophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000620) 


### facultative oxygen preference `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000612`

#### Added
- Class: [facultative oxygen preference](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000612) 

- [facultative oxygen preference](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000612) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "An oxygen preference that describes a microorganism that can grow with or without molecular oxygen." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OMP_0000087](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMP_0000087) 

- [facultative oxygen preference](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000612) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "Ox_facultative_aerobe_anaerobe" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [BactoTraits_databaseV2_Jun2022.csv](https://ordar.otelo.univ-lorraine.fr/files/ORDAR-53/BactoTraits_databaseV2_Jun2022.csv) 

- [facultative oxygen preference](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000612) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "facultative oxygen preference" 

- [facultative oxygen preference](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000612) SubClassOf [oxygen preference](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000601)

  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [bacteria_archaea_traits](https://github.com/jmadin/bacteria_archaea_traits) 

- [facultative psychrophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000720) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "facultative psychrophilic" 

- [facultative psychrophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000720) SubClassOf [temperature preference](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000613)

### gram negative `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000699`

- Class: [gram negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000699) 

- [gram negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000699) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A gram stain in which bacteria do not retain crystal violet dye and appear pink or red after staining, indicating a thin peptidoglycan layer and presence of an outer membrane." 

- [gram negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000699) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Luke Wang"

### gram variable `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000700`

#### Added
- Class: [gram variable](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000700) 

- [gram variable](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000700) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Luke Wang" 

- [gram variable](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000700) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A gram stain in which bacteria from the same culture show both gram-positive and gram-negative staining characteristics, often due to age of culture or cell wall degradation."

  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [<https://bacdive.dsmz.de/>](https://bacdive.dsmz.de/) 

- [gram variable](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000700) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "gram variable" 

- [gram variable](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000700) SubClassOf [gram stain](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000697)

### grows in `https://w3id.org/metpo/2000517`

#### Added
- ObjectProperty: [grows in](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000517) 

- [grows in](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000517) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A relation between a microbe and a growth medium indicating that the microbe has been demonstrated to grow in that medium under some set of conditions. This relation represents a generalization from experimental observations reported in the literature or databases; it does not imply that the microbe will grow in the medium under all conditions." 

- [grows in](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000517) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "grows in" 

- [grows in](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000517) Domain [microbe](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000525) 

- [grows in](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000517) Range [growth medium](https://w3id.org/metpo/1004005) 


### growth medium `https://w3id.org/metpo/1004005`

#### Added
- Class: [growth medium](https://w3id.org/metpo/1004005) 

- [growth medium](https://w3id.org/metpo/1004005) [broadMatch](http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#broadMatch) [ProcessedMaterial](https://biolink.github.io/biolink-model/ProcessedMaterial) 

- [growth medium](https://w3id.org/metpo/1004005) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A material entity that provides the nutrients and environmental conditions necessary for the cultivation of microorganisms in vitro. Growth media may be liquid (broth) or solid (agar-based) and are formulated to support the growth of specific types of organisms." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OBI_0000079](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000079) 

- [growth medium](https://w3id.org/metpo/1004005) [comment](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#comment) "This class is equivalent to OBI:0000079 'culture medium'. It is included in METPO to serve as the range for growth-related object properties." 

- [growth medium](https://w3id.org/metpo/1004005) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "growth medium" 

- [growth medium](https://w3id.org/metpo/1004005) SubClassOf [material entity](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000186)

### isolated from environment with quality `https://w3id.org/metpo/2000068`

#### Added
- ObjectProperty: [isolated from environment with quality](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000068) 

- [isolated from environment with quality](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000068) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A relation between a microbe and a quality of the environment from which the microbe was isolated. Examples: a microbe isolated from an acidic environment has the relation `&lt;microbe&gt; METPO:2000068 PATO:0001429 'acidic'`; a microbe isolated from an anaerobic environment has `&lt;microbe&gt; METPO:2000068 PATO:0001456 'anaerobic'`. The relation does not by itself entail that the microbe is acidophilic, anaerobic, etc. as a phenotype; it only records the environment's quality at the time of isolation. Microbe phenotype assertions belong on a separate edge (e.g. METPO:1000615 acidophilic via has_phenotype)." 

- [isolated from environment with quality](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000068) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "isolated from environment with quality" 

- [isolated from environment with quality](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000068) Domain [microbe](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000525) 

- [isolated from environment with quality](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000068) Range [quality](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000188) 


### isolated from host with quality `https://w3id.org/metpo/2000067`

#### Added
- ObjectProperty: [isolated from host with quality](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000067) 

- [isolated from host with quality](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000067) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A relation between a microbe and a quality of the host from which the microbe was isolated. Examples: a microbe isolated from a juvenile host has the relation `&lt;microbe&gt; METPO:2000067 PATO:0001190 'juvenile'`; a microbe isolated from a female host has the relation `&lt;microbe&gt; METPO:2000067 PATO:0000383 'female'`. The relation is one-directional: it asserts that the host bore the named quality at isolation time, not that the microbe itself has the quality." 

- [isolated from host with quality](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000067) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "isolated from host with quality" 

- [isolated from host with quality](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000067) Domain [microbe](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000525) 

- [isolated from host with quality](https://w3id.org/metpo/2000067) Range [quality](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000188)

- [neutrophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1003001) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "neutralophile" 

- [neutrophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1003001) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "neutralophilic" 

- [neutrophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1003001) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "neutrophile" 

- [neutrophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1003001) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A pH growth preference characterized by optimal growth at near-neutral pH values, typically between pH 6.5 and 7.5." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OMP_0005010](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMP_0005010) 

  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [PATO_0070046](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PATO_0070046) 

- [neutrophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1003001) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "neutrophilic" 

- [neutrophilic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1003001) SubClassOf [pH growth preference](https://w3id.org/metpo/1003000) 


### nitrification `https://w3id.org/metpo/1005001`

#### Added
- Class: [nitrification](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005001) 

- [nitrification](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005001) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A biological process in which ammonia is oxidized to nitrite (ammonia oxidation) and nitrite is oxidized to nitrate (nitrite oxidation), in two steps." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [GO_0019329](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_0019329) 

  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [GO_0019332](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_0019332) 

- [nitrification](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005001) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "nitrification" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [<https://metatraits.embl.de/>](https://metatraits.embl.de/) 

- [nitrification](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005001) [comment](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#comment) "MetaTraits maps to OMIT:0027217 (wrong ontology). Correct GO terms are GO:0019329 (ammonia oxidation) and GO:0019332 (nitrite oxidation)." 

- [nitrification](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005001) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "nitrification" 

- [nitrification](https://w3id.org/metpo/1005001) SubClassOf [biological process](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000630)

### oligotrophic `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000654`

#### Added
- Class: [oligotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000654) 

- [oligotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000654) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Anthea Guo" 

- [oligotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000654) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Jed Dongjin Kim-Ozaeta" 

- [oligotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000654) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A nutrient adaptation characterized by the ability to thrive in environments with very low nutrient concentrations, typically possessing efficient nutrient uptake and utilization systems." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [ENVO_01000774](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/ENVO_01000774) 

  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [ENVO_00002223](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/ENVO_00002223) 

- [oligotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000654) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "oligotroph" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [<https://bacdive.dsmz.de/>](https://bacdive.dsmz.de/) 

- [oligotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000654) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "TT_oligotroph" 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [BactoTraits_databaseV2_Jun2022.csv](https://ordar.otelo.univ-lorraine.fr/files/ORDAR-53/BactoTraits_databaseV2_Jun2022.csv) 

- [oligotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000654) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "oligotrophic" 

- [oligotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000654) SubClassOf [nutrient adaptation](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000731)

- [organoheterotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000664) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "organoheterotroph"

### oxidase negative `https://w3id.org/metpo/1007086`

#### Added
- Class: [oxidase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007086) 

- [oxidase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007086) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Marcin Joachimiak" 

- [oxidase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007086) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "oxidase -" 

- [oxidase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007086) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "oxidase test negative" 

- [oxidase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007086) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "Test-outcome phenotype where the oxidase test yields a negative result. The underlying enzyme-organism relation should additionally be asserted via &lt;organism&gt; METPO:2000303 'does not show activity of' GO:0004129 'cytochrome-c oxidase activity'." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OMP_0006084](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMP_0006084) 

- [oxidase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007086) [comment](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#comment) "subset=metpo_proposal_2026_04; priority=MEDIUM" 

- [oxidase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007086) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "oxidase negative" 

- [oxidase negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007086) SubClassOf [oxidase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007081)

### oxidase test `https://w3id.org/metpo/1007081`

#### Added
- Class: [oxidase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007081) 

- [oxidase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007081) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Marcin Joachimiak" 

- [oxidase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007081) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "cytochrome oxidase test" 

- [oxidase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007081) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "oxidase activity test" 

- [oxidase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007081) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A biochemical test that detects cytochrome c oxidase activity using a redox indicator. - [oxidase test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007081) SubClassOf [phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000059)

### photolithotrophic `https://w3id.org/metpo/1000658`

#### Added
- Class: [photolithotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000658)

- [photolithotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000658) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Luke Wang" 

- [photolithotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000658) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A trophic type in which an organism uses light as the energy source and inorganic compounds as electron donors, typically with carbon dioxide as the primary carbon source." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [MICRO_0001482](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/MICRO_0001482) 

- [photolithotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000658) [hasRelatedSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "photolithotroph"

- [photolithotrophic](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000658) SubClassOf [trophic type](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000631)

### polytrichous flagellation `https://w3id.org/metpo/1007006`

#### Added
- Class: [polytrichous flagellation](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007006) 

- [polytrichous flagellation](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007006) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Marcin Joachimiak"

### urease negative `https://w3id.org/metpo/1007088`

#### Added
- Class: [urease negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007088) 

- [urease negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007088) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Marcin Joachimiak" 

- [urease negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007088) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "urease -" 

- [urease negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007088) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "urease test negative" 

- [urease negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007088) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "Test-outcome phenotype where the urease test yields a negative result. The underlying enzyme-organism relation should additionally be asserted via &lt;organism&gt; METPO:2000303 'does not show activity of' GO:0009039 'urease activity'." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OMP_0006090](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMP_0006090) 

- [urease negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007088) [comment](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#comment) "subset=metpo_proposal_2026_04; priority=MEDIUM" 

- [urease negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007088) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "urease negative" 

- [urease negative](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007088) SubClassOf [urease test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007082)

- [urease positive](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007087) SubClassOf [urease test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007082) 


### urease test `https://w3id.org/metpo/1007082`

#### Added
- Class: [urease test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007082) 

- [urease test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007082) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Marcin Joachimiak" 

- [urease test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007082) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "urea hydrolysis test" 

- [urease test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007082) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "urease activity test" 

- [urease test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007082) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A biochemical test that detects urease enzyme activity by observing urea hydrolysis (typically via a pH-indicator color change). The test outcome (positive or negative) is captured by its child classes; this class itself does not assert urease activity." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [OMP_0000222](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMP_0000222) 

- [urease test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007082) [comment](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#comment) "subset=metpo_proposal_2026_04; priority=MEDIUM" 

- [urease test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007082) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "urease test" 

- [urease test](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007082) SubClassOf [phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000059)

### xerophilic phenotype `https://w3id.org/metpo/1007092`

#### Added
- Class: [xerophilic phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007092) 

- [xerophilic phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007092) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Marcin Joachimiak" 

- [xerophilic phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007092) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "xerophile" 

- [xerophilic phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007092) [hasExactSynonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "xerotolerant" 

- [xerophilic phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007092) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A phenotype characterized by a microbe that thrives in low water-activity environments (typically aw &lt; 0.85), where the limiting factor is water activity (aw) rather than solute concentration; distinct from halophily and osmotic tolerance." 
  - [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) [Q980491](wikidata:Q980491) 

- [xerophilic phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007092) [comment](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#comment) "subset=metpo_proposal_2026_04; priority=MEDIUM"

- [xerophilic phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1007092) SubClassOf [phenotype](https://w3id.org/metpo/1000059)
